flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at Belhaven University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.4k vs 1.9k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Belhaven University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (44.3% → 37.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Belhaven University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).
